_evidence: DRB options-semantics — consolidated Task-E record for Phase 82 (options-aware native daily P&L)
_subject: Settled facts (E1–E5) from three 2026-07 live probes on key 95089958 (strategy c225840c 'Phoenix Protocol', options+perps, BTC-settled). These are INPUTS to the plan — the executor builds against them as fixed; re-deriving them is out of scope.

E1_unrealized_pl_is_session_delta.finding: options_settlement_summary.unrealized_pl is a per-session DELTA (change since the last settlement), NOT a running level. Present + numeric on ALL summary rows alongside realized_pl. Summary row `change` is always 0.0.
E1_unrealized_pl_is_session_delta.consequence: The daily P&L MUST sum realized_pl + unrealized_pl (both load-bearing). Dropping unrealized_pl breaks the balance-identity closure. No per-scope grouping / day-over-day diffing needed — the flat scope concat is safe for summation. R3 (level-contingency machinery) is DEAD.
E1_unrealized_pl_is_session_delta.guard: summary row with nonzero change, or absent/null/non-numeric realized_pl OR unrealized_pl -> LedgerValuationError (schema-drift fail-loud).

E2_expiry_in_summary_channel.finding: Option expiry economics live in the options_settlement_summary channel, not (only) in option delivery.change. => coverage-gated R1 selected; R2 (delivery-carries-payout) is DEAD.
E2_expiry_in_summary_channel.oracle_rejection: The row-embedded daily-equity snapshot was REJECTED as a per-day discriminator: it matched Δequity−flows on only ~13% of days (intraday mark-timing noise; perp session_upl NULL on every settlement row). Replaced by the BALANCE IDENTITY (Σchange == Δbalance per day; computed-total == Σchange over CASH_BEARING per currency).

E3_commission_present_summary_fee_exclud.finding: commission is POSITIVE and present + numeric on 100% of option trade/delivery rows. Summary economics are fee-EXCLUDED.
E3_commission_present_summary_fee_exclud.closure_proof: covered-era option fee-gross Σ(change+commission) = 9.222194 BTC == Σ(realized_pl+unrealized_pl) = 9.222190 BTC (residual 3.7e-6 BTC).
E3_commission_present_summary_fee_exclud.consequence: Inside coverage, option trade/delivery contribute −commission (fee kept, premium/payout cash EXCLUDED — carried by the summary channel). This neither drops nor double-counts fees.
E3_commission_present_summary_fee_exclud.guard: option trade/delivery INSIDE coverage with absent/null/non-numeric commission -> LedgerValuationError.

E4_coverage_window.finding: Deribit began emitting options_settlement_summary rows ~2025-01-12 (exchange-side feature rollout). Per currency c: coverage_window[c] = [first_summary_ts[c] − 24h, last_summary_ts[c]]. No summaries for c => no window => every option row of c stays cash-basis `change`.
E4_coverage_window.lower_bound_minus_24h: the first summary settles the session PRECEDING it, so option rows in the 24h before it are already carried.
E4_coverage_window.upper_bound_last_summary: option trades after the last crawled summary (live partial session) stay cash-basis until the next crawl's summary lands; the full-history recompute converges them onto the covered rule (trailing edge — keeps the balance-identity guard closing every compute).

E5_acceptance_hard_numbers.balance_identity_days: Σchange == Δbalance closes 279/280 days on the probe account (1 miss = 8dp rounding — tolerance absorbs it).

settled_do_not_reopen: single-scope: key IS its own subaccount (drb03)
funding is settlement-bundled (no separate funding type)
inverse-vs-linear is a RED HERRING — the BTC book is simply the one whose history predates the rollout
